notes: AWS Lambda/DynamoDB/S3 = cloud; CI/CD + CloudWatch = distributed ops; query caching = distributed systems

notes: Saayam CI/CD bullet is direct; serverless deployment; Rust backend replacing production system. Ordering matters here.

notes: Crown sensor stack validation = HW/SW; cross-team HW/FW/ML alignment; roadmap sequencing HW+FW. All Matic but ordering debatable.

notes: No public sector experience — stakeholder management bullets are the closest transferable skill. All rankings are approximate.

qualification: Experience with real-time systems and low-latency requirements
notes: Query caching for throughput = latency work; Rust backend for real-time assembly; real-time location in chat. Close between e9f0 and e7b5.

qualification: Owned a P&L or revenue-impacting product area
notes: Executive approval for initiative = business impact; 75%->30% rejection rate = cost savings; shipped feature = revenue potential. Weak signals.

qualification: 8+ years of total experience in technology with design management
notes: User doesn't have 8+ years — these are best PM/leadership bullets but none truly match. Expect low scores.

notes: Chat coordination (in-app messaging) = mobile; Figma prototypes = UX; fitness platform CNN = mobile app context. Ordering between Wurq bullets is close.

qualification: Experience managing a team of 5+ engineers or direct reports
notes: Aligned HW/FW/ML teams = team leadership signal; roadmap for module = scope proxy; E2E coordination. None are direct people management.
